title: Metamorphoses VI: Arachne's Challenge
description: A mortal weaver challenges Athena and is transformed into a spider — the price of surpassing the gods.
introduction: A mortal weaver challenges Athena and is transformed into a spider — the price of surpassing the gods.

translation.text: Arachne wove a tapestry showing the gods' crimes. She wove it perfectly. Athena could find no flaw. In rage, she struck her.
